item.summary: Potential contamination with Salmonella. Product details: Low Heat Non-Fat Dried Milk Powder - paper bags 25 kg. (packed under 5 labels: Off Grade NFDM Variable; Extra Grade NFDM Standard rBST Free; Grade A NFDM LH Basic; Grade A NFDM LH Standard rBST Free; Grade A NFDM LH Tier 1 rBST Free)
item.affectedPeople: U.S. Distribution: Unknown and to be determined during RAC assignment. Domestic consignees pick-up product from CDI. Foreign Distribution: Mexico, Philippines, Dominican Republic.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
